name: Freezer Cucumber Pickles
recipeInstructions:
Combine cucumbers, onions, salt and water in two large bowls. Let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
Add sugar and cider vinegar to the mixture, stirring until all sugar dissolves.
Pack the contents into 1 pint freezer containers, leaving 1 inch of headspace.
Cover tightly and freeze for up to 6 weeks.
Thaw at room temperature for 4 hours before serving.
